main.description: A single GitHub Sponsors event. One record per event, rkey is a TID.

name.description: Display name of the sponsor, if known.

action.description: Sponsorship action: created, cancelled, edited, tier_changed, pending_cancellation, or pending_tier_change.

tierName.description: Name of the sponsorship tier at the time of this event.

monthlyUsd.description: Monthly sponsorship amount in USD at the time of this event.
